====================================================================================================
 LOG DE EXECUÇÃO - MIC-1 (Etapa 2 - Tarefa 2)
====================================================================================================
--- CICLO 1 ---
IR (Instrução)        : 001101000000110000010
Regs. Início          : H=00000000000000000000000000000001 | OPC=00000000000000000000000000000000 | TOS=00000000000000000000000000000010 | CPP=00000000000000000000000000000000 | LV=00000000000000000000000000000000 | SP=00000000000000000000000000000000 | PC=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MDR=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MAR=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MBR=10000001
Comanda Barramento B  : MBR
Escreve Barramento C  : SP, LV
Flags                 : N=1 | Z=0 | Vai-um=0
Regs. Fim             : H=00000000000000000000000000000001 | OPC=00000000000000000000000000000000 | TOS=00000000000000000000000000000010 | CPP=00000000000000000000000000000000 | LV=11111111111111111111111110000001 | SP=11111111111111111111111110000001 | PC=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MDR=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MAR=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MBR=10000001
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--- CICLO 2 ---
IR (Instrução)        : 001101000000010000011
Regs. Início          : H=00000000000000000000000000000001 | OPC=00000000000000000000000000000000 | TOS=00000000000000000000000000000010 | CPP=00000000000000000000000000000000 | LV=11111111111111111111111110000001 | SP=11111111111111111111111110000001 | PC=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MDR=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MAR=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MBR=10000001
Comanda Barramento B  : MBRU
Escreve Barramento C  : SP
Flags                 : N=0 | Z=0 | Vai-um=0
Regs. Fim             : H=00000000000000000000000000000001 | OPC=00000000000000000000000000000000 | TOS=00000000000000000000000000000010 | CPP=00000000000000000000000000000000 | LV=11111111111111111111111110000001 | SP=00000000000000000000000010000001 | PC=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MDR=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MAR=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MBR=10000001
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--- CICLO 3 ---
IR (Instrução)        : 001111011000000000111
Regs. Início          : H=00000000000000000000000000000001 | OPC=00000000000000000000000000000000 | TOS=00000000000000000000000000000010 | CPP=00000000000000000000000000000000 | LV=11111111111111111111111110000001 | SP=00000000000000000000000010000001 | PC=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MDR=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MAR=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MBR=10000001
Comanda Barramento B  : TOS
Escreve Barramento C  : H
Flags                 : N=0 | Z=0 | Vai-um=0
Regs. Fim             : H=00000000000000000000000000000100 | OPC=00000000000000000000000000000000 | TOS=00000000000000000000000000000010 | CPP=00000000000000000000000000000000 | LV=11111111111111111111111110000001 | SP=00000000000000000000000010000001 | PC=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MDR=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MAR=00000000000000000000000000000000 | MBR=10000001
